nasb.text: Therefore, they will now go into exile at the head of the exiles, And the sprawlers’ banqueting will pass away.

esv.text: Therefore they shall now be the first of those who go into exile, and the revelry of those who stretch themselves out shall pass away.”

cnv.text: 因此，你們將是最先被擄去的人， 宴樂享受的日子必要消逝。

ccb.text: 所以，你们要首先被掳， 你们的宴乐将从此消逝！
